name: Mean and Lean Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Beef round steak, cut into half-inch thick and trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the steak.
2. Thinly slice across the grain into bite-size strips.
3. In a skillet, brown meat, half at a time, in hot oil for 2 to 4 minutes.
4. Remove meat from the skillet and add sliced mushrooms; cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
5. Remove mushrooms and add sherry, water, and beef bouillon granules to the skillet; bring to boiling.
6. Cook uncovered over high heat 3 minutes or until liquid is reduced to 1/3 cup.
7. Combine yogurt, flour, sugar, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl; mix well.
8. Stir the low-fat yogurt mixture into the liquid in the skillet; stir in meat and mushrooms.
9. Cook and stir over low heat until the mixture is thickened and heated through (do not boil).
10. Serve over hot cooked rice.
11. Sprinkle with snipped parsley, if desired.
Makes 4 servings.
